classificationRule: Cody is not the default production runtime. Use Cody only for engineering, deployment, exception remediation, or explicitly classified bridge execution.

activeTitleFindings.title: The Intentional Leader
activeTitleFindings.runtime: Governed email thread and Author Operating Center review surface

activeTitleFindings.title: Before You Were Born
activeTitleFindings.runtime: Cody-assisted editorial bridge until CAP-001 runtime is commissioned

activeTitleFindings.title: The General's Will and Last Testament
activeTitleFindings.runtime: Cody-assisted editorial bridge until CAP-001 runtime is commissioned

activeTitleFindings.title: The Long Watch
activeTitleFindings.runtime: Cody-assisted editorial review bridge until event-driven Stage 0 runtime is promoted

processes.name: Editorial Review
processes.trigger: Publisher-approved editorial review start or active Editorial stage
processes.runtime: Cody-assisted bridge; Stage 0 diagnostic runtime exists but is not yet the default end-to-end production executor for every title
processes.appIdentity: Cody interactive session plus governed Dataverse app identity where scripts write evidence
processes.retry: Manual bridge retry with idempotency checks
processes.proof: Active titles can be read and staged, but routine automatic execution is not verified

processes.name: Developmental Editing
processes.trigger: Publisher-approved CAP-001 stage start
processes.runtime: Cody-assisted editorial execution until CAP-001 runtime is commissioned
processes.appIdentity: Cody interactive session plus governed Dataverse write identity where available
processes.retry: Manual bridge resume from stage evidence
processes.proof: The Intentional Leader proved the workflow; parallel developmental titles are active but still bridge-run

processes.name: Line Editing
processes.trigger: Publisher-approved CAP-002 stage start
processes.runtime: Cody-assisted editorial execution; release and author-review read models are deployed
processes.appIdentity: Cody interactive session plus governed Dataverse write identity where available
processes.retry: Manual bridge resume from line-edit ledger and Core stage evidence
processes.proof: The Intentional Leader line-editing release and approval completed

processes.name: Copyediting
processes.trigger: Publisher-approved CAP-003 stage start
processes.runtime: Cody-assisted copyediting bridge; author-response recognition and stage transition routes are deployed
processes.appIdentity: Cody interactive session plus governed Dataverse write identity where available
processes.retry: Manual bridge resume with author-response idempotency checks
processes.proof: The Intentional Leader copyediting package and author approval completed

processes.name: Proofreading
processes.trigger: Publisher-approved CAP-004 start after copyediting approval
processes.runtime: Cody-assisted proofreading bridge; author package delivery routes are deployed
processes.appIdentity: Cody interactive session plus governed Dataverse write identity where available
processes.retry: Manual bridge resume from proofreading stage/package evidence
processes.proof: The Intentional Leader reached Proofreading Author Review

processes.name: Internal QA
processes.trigger: Editorial bridge or production bridge completes a pass
processes.runtime: Cody-assisted QA pass until dedicated QA runtime is commissioned
processes.appIdentity: Cody interactive session
processes.proof: QA evidence is logged, but no independent automatic QA runtime is verified

processes.name: Package generation
processes.trigger: Publisher release readiness after QA
processes.runtime: Cody-assisted document generation plus SharePoint filing
processes.appIdentity: Cody interactive session and SharePoint/Dataverse app identities
processes.proof: Multiple packages generated and registered; permanent generator runtime not verified

processes.name: Package release
processes.trigger: Publisher approved release action
processes.runtime: Publisher Operating Center bounded action plus ACS/email relay and Author Workspace artifact visibility
processes.appIdentity: Governed publishing sender and Dataverse app identity
processes.proof: Author package release and active-stage artifact visibility are deployed

processes.name: Author review response
processes.trigger: Released author-review package
processes.runtime: Author email reply and Author Operating Center review surface
processes.appIdentity: Author CIAM identity or governed email identity
processes.proof: The Intentional Leader waits on author proofreading response; prior copyediting response was reconciled

processes.name: Cover Creative Brief
processes.trigger: Publisher starts cover brief from Publisher Operating Center
processes.runtime: Publisher Operating Center production command action
processes.appIdentity: Dataverse app identity
processes.proof: The Intentional Leader cover brief and internal review are active

processes.name: Cover Concept Development
processes.trigger: Approved cover creative brief
processes.runtime: Cody-assisted creative bridge until a dedicated design runtime or external vendor workflow is commissioned
processes.appIdentity: Cody interactive session
processes.proof: Concept development began, but no permanent creative runtime is verified

processes.name: Interior Layout
processes.trigger: Publisher starts interior layout after proofreading/final manuscript readiness
processes.runtime: Publisher Operating Center production command action
processes.appIdentity: Dataverse app identity
processes.proof: Readiness queue exists; start requires final manuscript entry criteria

processes.name: Production QA
processes.trigger: Interior/cover production artifact ready
processes.runtime: No verified production QA runtime
processes.appIdentity: Not established
processes.proof: Capability gap

processes.name: Distribution readiness
processes.trigger: Production QA and metadata readiness
processes.runtime: No verified distribution readiness runtime
processes.appIdentity: Not established
processes.proof: Capability gap

processes.name: Royalty ingestion
processes.trigger: Publisher upload or no-activity confirmation
processes.runtime: Royalty import API and source-control ingestion route
processes.appIdentity: Dataverse app identity and SharePoint evidence path
processes.idempotency: Source file SHA-256, source system, account, period, row identity
processes.proof: Royalty ingestion platform deployed; decision rows remain in publisher queue

processes.name: Royalty normalization
processes.trigger: Accepted royalty source file
processes.runtime: Royalty import API normalization
processes.appIdentity: Dataverse app identity
processes.proof: Normalized row counts and held rows are available in Publisher Operating Center

processes.name: Royalty decision processing
processes.trigger: Publisher reviews consolidated royalty decision package
processes.runtime: Publisher Operating Center royalty decision queue
processes.appIdentity: Dataverse app identity after publisher action
processes.idempotency: Decision package key and affected source rows
processes.proof: Decision package exists; Jackie decisions remain required

processes.name: Royalty statement generation
processes.trigger: Resolved royalty rows and payment evidence
processes.runtime: Royalty statement refresh process
processes.appIdentity: Dataverse app identity
processes.proof: Draft statements exist; author visibility remains off pending approval

processes.name: Publisher Today refresh
processes.trigger: Page load/API refresh; scheduled CAP-010 refresh where configured
processes.runtime: Publisher Operating Center read model
processes.appIdentity: Dataverse read identity
processes.proof: Publisher Today renders from Core queues, workload, portfolio, production, royalties, and execution logs

processes.name: Execution exception remediation
processes.trigger: Failed execution log, runtime exception, deployment failure, or read-model defect
processes.runtime: Cody engineering/remediation lane
processes.appIdentity: Cody interactive session and least-privilege app identities required for the repair
processes.idempotency: Incident correlation ID and affected record scope
processes.proof: Publisher Today failed-transition alerts route to Engineering rather than routine Cody business ownership

processes.name: Author Workspace refresh
processes.trigger: Author session/context request after Core stage/artifact changes
processes.runtime: Author portal context API and active-stage artifact read model
processes.appIdentity: Dataverse read identity
processes.proof: CAP-008 session and active-stage artifact visibility are deployed

processes.name: SharePoint stage synchronization
processes.trigger: Approved Core stage transition or publisher placement action
processes.runtime: SharePoint title-folder move/sync process
processes.appIdentity: SharePoint site-scoped app identity
processes.retry: Title/folder idempotency and drift restart action
processes.proof: Stage-sync doctrine exists; active title migration is partially commissioned
